title: benstonea ornithocephala
intro: Benstonea ornithocephala, also known as the "bird-headed Benstonea", is a species of flowering plant in the family Pandanaceae, native to Papua New Guinea. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Benstonea ornithocephala is typically used in the form of an infusion or decoction, often in combination with other medicinal plants, to leverage its medicinal properties and health benefits.
